subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath come before the Face, and the Most Holy Gaze hath beheld it, and at its outset these words were recorded: "O my God! If..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی الوجه حاضر و طرف اقدس بان ناظر و اول آن این کلمات مذکور الهی اگر کاس
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
